a u l t
t a s t s t s 툺 m s t
칮 y틣 칧
m a r퍈 r t n a
톖 r 톖 r a s v a s v a
r a 톩 s a
p r a t h t
p 톩 c c a
p 톩 c 칧
p a i틣 t a
p o u틣 k a

톝틣 v
e i n i 콂 k
톝 p a
톝 s k a
e i r 톝 t 톩
톝 l c 톝 l 톢 a
f a l t
f a n틣 톩 n틣 l
f 톩 n틣 l a n틣 l
f j o u틣 칧 톩 r
f f r a 톩 a
f 톩 l t l t

f a r

m a m k r

k a틣 s

h a u틣 m h

h 콉 l t
h 톖 f틣 칧 툺 r
s u s

c퉗 톝 n틣 t a n 톩

k퉗 v a틣 칧
c퉗 톩 n틣 a
l e i틣 j a
l e i틣 k o l k 툺

a u틣 l퍈 l퍈 t a l 톝 r
l o u틣 칧
l s i 콂 k s
l 톝틣 칧 i틣 칧 a r
m a n틣 a

s c 톩틣 톢
s t 톩틣 t a
s k r 톖틣 a
s t a u t 툺 r
s 톖 톖틣
s 톝 n t l t n
s t a i틣 t a
s t o u틣 r 툺 r
s t j a l t a
s v 톩틣 칧 톩

s r 톝 s k r t
s i틣 r a
s o u틣 l
t퉗 톩 l m 톩 l m 톩 n틣
r e i틣 s a
t퉗 톩 l k a n
v a틣 칧 a
v 톝 r a
v 톝 r k

v i틣 s
a r a
o u틣 t 톩
톖 h k 툺 r k 툺 r
s c u틣
i틣 s a
풪 톝 m a
풪 톝 s틣
풪 r 톩 칧 톩
풪 콉 r
